composition: WJ* = AEAD + FROST_(2/3) + H-Merkle + G + R

H_Merkle.root: R = MerkleRoot{H(C), H(M), H(G), H(W), H(sigma_F)}

objects.Omega: (C, M, G, W, sigma_F, R, path)

selected_threshold.reason: minimize complexity while improving loss tolerance and single-key compromise resistance

implementation_mapping.AEAD: assembly envelope open/seal and Gate-authorized open paths
implementation_mapping.FROST_2_of_3: target production authority profile; current fixture FROST remains test-only
implementation_mapping.H_Merkle: ledger leaf/root/proof primitives and witness/ledger tooling
implementation_mapping.G: Gate contract and rooted authority predicates
implementation_mapping.R: public witness bundle and ledger evidence

non_claims: this model does not make fixture FROST production authority
this model does not claim post-quantum security
this model does not claim runtime sandboxing
this model does not replace independent cryptographic audit
